positiveObservations: Invoice template uses escapeHtml() for all user-provided fields (XSS-safe)
Analytics raw SQL uses ALLOWED_UNITS whitelist (injection-safe)
Price tier overlap uses clean mathematical algorithm with null-as-Infinity handling
Wishlist uses deleteMany for idempotent remove
Order status validation inside $transaction (race-condition-safe from 0006 fix)
Customer web auth pattern (localStorage) is consistent with existing codebase
